checks.name: public dataset references
checks.evidence: Live checks confirmed the home page references Glasgow Cranfield, BEIR, Amazon ESCI, and behavior source-not-selected status; Cranfield data and overview pages include the Glasgow Cranfield reference; BEIR and ESCI planned pages include their source URLs.

checks.name: public search stability
checks.evidence: /api/search?q=wing%20pressure%20distribution&size=3 returned top result id 652 after the content update.

evidence_quality: Public verification covers the new source references and confirms the live search baseline remains stable.
